---
title: "Homework 3"
author: "Autrin Peralta"
date: 03/08/2026
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Set Up

```{r}
#| label: reading iun packages
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)#general use for data wrangling, cleaning, etc.
library(janitor)

library(readr)
salinity <- read_csv("~/ENVS-193DS/HW3/data/salinity-pickleweed (1).csv")


```
